provider_fix_version.note: GCP changed default Cloud Build service account behavior for new projects. Existing functions retain the over-privileged default. Customers must configure a custom service account for Cloud Build.

remediation_actions.title: Configure custom Cloud Build service account for Cloud Functions
remediation_actions.description:
1. Create a dedicated service account with minimal permissions:
   gcloud iam service-accounts create cloudbuild-functions --display-name='Cloud Build for Functions'
2. Grant only required roles (cloudfunctions.developer, storage.objectViewer).
3. Update Cloud Functions to use the custom service account:
   gcloud functions deploy {function} --build-service-account=cloudbuild-functions@{project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
4. Revoke the default Cloud Build service account's broad permissions.

detections.description: Checks that the Cloud Function's build service account is a custom service account rather than the default Cloud Build SA. Reverting to the default SA reopens the ConfusedFunction privilege escalation path.
